tasks.subject: Adapt resume for mobile screens
tasks.description:
Make the interactive junkyard resume usable on mobile phones. Current behavior shows a "rotate your phone" overlay on portrait mobile. Need to:

1. Remove rotation-hint blocking on portrait mobile and make stage visible
2. Scale stage appropriately for mobile viewport (fit width, allow vertical scrolling)
3. Make inspector panel full-width/slide-up on mobile instead of 560px right panel
4. Increase touch target sizes for interactive items
5. Adjust font sizes and spacing for readability on small screens
6. Make chat widget (CogwheelFAB) responsive and non-intrusive on mobile
7. Make intro card and toast notifications fit mobile screens
8. Ensure Tweaks panel works on mobile

Files to modify:
- resume-2/Patrik Junkyard Resume.html (CSS + minor React adjustments)
- resume-2/Patrik Junkyard Resume.html.backup (same CSS changes)
- resume-2/uploads/mulle_resume/Patrik Junkyard Resume.html (if similar structure)
